videos.title: Car with giant bull as passenger pulled over by Nebraska police
videos.description:
A man was pulled over by Nebraska police after an onlooker reported him driving with a full-sized bull named Howdy Doody in his passenger seat. News Channel Nebraska's Andrew Pfeifer has the details.

» Subscribe to NBC News: http://nbcnews.to/SubscribeToNBC

videos.title: Cross Country Skiing vs Running | Comparing for Serious Athletes
videos.description:
We compare cross-country skiing and running in this video. Read the entire article here: https://deepertrails.com/cross-country-skiing-vs-running/

Last winter we went cross-country skiing for the first time, and we learned a few things. We're looking forward to going again this year, and we'll share some more footage. 

**JOIN OUR EMAIL LIST TO...**
https://deepertrails.com/community-sign-up/ Be a part of our community; stay in touch, get notified about new videos, and more.

**THE CORE OF DEEPER TRAILS**
At its core, Deeper Trails is about doing anything we can to FEEL MORE ALIVE. Doing difficult, uncomfortable, and nurturing activities to gain a sense of accomplishment and to stimulate and enliven ourselves. 

**GEAR USED**
Camera: https://amzn.to/3Do4HgO

**THE CONTENT WE PRODUCE**
Deeper Trails seeks to provide the best possible information, techniques, and tips for the things we love to do. We LOVE trail running, hiking, backpacking, foraging for mushrooms, and just about everything that has to do with the outdoors. 

**LINKS**
We are a user supported channel. Some of the above links may be affiliate links. We are a participant in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means to earn advertising fees by advertising and linking to Amazon.com

Music provided by Epidemic Sound
